compositional_truth_check.details: The biome is devoid of any visible vegetative matter. All registered specimens (P1-P4) are absent or have undergone complete decomposition/removal.

plant_audit.p1_yellow_pot: Empty. Soil surface appears undisturbed but barren.
plant_audit.p3_black_pot: Empty. The white rabbit anchor is present, but the host plant is missing.
plant_audit.p4_shared_black_pot: Empty. No evidence of Silver Guest.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Dark, damp, and devoid of organic growth. No fungal blooms or moss detected.
biome_observations.desk_surface: Clean, no debris or incidental growth observed.
biome_observations.anomalies: The presence of a white rabbit figurine in an empty pot suggests a decorative or memorial setup rather than an active botanical environment.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_current: Across the 5-day sequence, there is zero evidence of plant life. The pots have remained consistently empty throughout the observation window.

visual_health_inference.conclusion: The biome is currently non-functional. There is no plant health to assess as the pots are empty.
visual_health_inference.recommendation: Re-populate the biome with viable specimens if botanical observation is the intended goal.

anomalies: Total absence of plant life across all registered pots.
Presence of a white rabbit figurine in an empty pot (P3).
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit confirms a complete absence of botanical specimens across all monitored containers. The environment is sterile. The white rabbit figurine remains the only constant, serving as a scale anchor for an empty pot. No changes in soil moisture or composition were detected over the 5-day period, indicating a static, non-biological state.
